title: BEACON — AI Crawler Analytics | CAPXEL | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceSee Every AI Agent That Visits Your BrandBEACON monitors every crawler request to your AI-optimized layer and turns it into monthly intelligence reports. Know which AI systems are reading your site, how often, and what they care about.See What AI SeesExplore ASOThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.Crawler IntelligenceProof Your ASO Investment Is WorkingAI crawler traffic is the leading indicator of agentic discovery. BEACON turns “we think it’s being read” into hard evidence: who visited, what they accessed, and what to optimize next.14+ AI Crawler IdentificationIdentify GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Googlebot, PerplexityBot, Bingbot, and more - mapped to clean, readable categories.Monthly Intelligence ReportsBranded PDF with executive summary, crawler breakdown, and content heat map - delivered automatically.Real-Time Activity FeedLive crawler activity like: "3 minutes ago — GPTBot accessed your product page."Coverage Gap AnalysisSee which pages AI cares about vs. what it ignores - then prioritize ASO updates with certainty.DG1 Change DetectionAutomated scans detect site changes and flag when your LLM-LD layer needs a refresh.Alert SystemGet notified when a new crawler appears or when activity drops (e.g. "Activity dropped 20%").Your Monthly IntelligenceWhat You'll See Every MonthA branded intelligence report delivered on the 1st of every month - no login required, no dashboards to learn. Clear answers to the questions that matter.Executive SummaryTop-line overview: total AI agent visits, month-over-month trend, and key takeaways your team can act on immediately.Crawler BreakdownWhich AI systems visited - GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Googlebot, and more - broken down by frequency and recency.Content Heat MapSee which pages AI agents access most vs. which they ignore. Know exactly where to focus your next optimization.Actionable RecommendationsCoverage gap analysis with specific next steps: which pages need richer data, which products are underrepresented, where to expand.Exclusive IntelligenceData You Can't Get Anywhere ElseNo analytics tool, no SEO platform, and no third-party estimate can tell you which AI agents are reading your brand. This data exists only at the server level - and CAPXEL gives you direct visibility into it. Every visit. Every agent. Every month.Direct server-level observabilityMonth-over-month trend trackingZero impact on site performanceBEACONSee What AI SeesKnow which AI systems are reading your brand, what they are consuming, and where your coverage gaps live.See What AI SeesExplore ASORelated: INSPEX · SPYBOXFAQCommon questions about BEACON.What is BEACON?What AI crawlers does it track?How often do I get reports?What if my site has low crawler traffic?Does BEACON slow down my site?Do I need ASO first?
